title: wedelia isolepis
intro: Wedelia isolepis, also known as the yellow flowered Wedelia, is a plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and aromatic leaves. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia isolepis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever and respiratory issues, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
